ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "portal_id" TEXT /* Portal ID associated with the patient record */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient at the time of record */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kg */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient in cm */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis (e.g., AMS, SZ) */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icu_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ICU record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient in the patient table */,
  "annotation_no" INTEGER /* Annotation number for the record */,
  "sz_presence" INTEGER /* Presence of seizures (1 if present, 0 if absent) */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the diagnosis in the diagnoses table */,
  "test_set" INTEGER /* Test set identifier (0 indicates initial test) */,
  "sz_num" INTEGER /* Size of the seizure number data */,
  "mean_sz_len" REAL /* Mean size length of data segments */,
  "record_len" INTEGER /* Total length of the record in bytes */,
  "num_artifact" INTEGER /* Number of artifacts recorded during the tests */,
  "vital_signs" TEXT /* Vital signs (e.g., heart rate, blood pressure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_records_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES diagnoses ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient visiting the ICU */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in hours */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., scheduled, emergency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., EEG, Blood Test) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test in the tests table */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ICU record in the icu_records table */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the test result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date of the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES icu_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication prescribed */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of administration */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Possible side effects of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_medications" (
  "patient_medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-medication record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient in the patients table */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the medication in the medications table */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of medication administration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of medication administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medications_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nurses" (
  "nurse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nurse */,
  "nurse_name" TEXT /* Name of the nurse */,
  "shift" TEXT /* The shift of the nurse (e.g., Day, Night) */,
  "nurse_specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the nurse (e.g., ICU, ER) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nurse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icu_staff" (
  "icu_staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ICU staff record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ICU record in the icu_records table */,
  "nurse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nurse in the nurses table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the nurse (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icu_staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_staff_nurse_id FOREIGN KEY ("nurse_id") REFERENCES nurses ("nurse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_staff_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES icu_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number assigned to the ICU room */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the room */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., single, shared) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room assignment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient in the patients table */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room in the rooms table */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission to the room */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge from the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_assignments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_assignments_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient in the patients table */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., individual, group) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the records */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ICU record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed (e.g., view patient info, update medication) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES icu_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, nurse, doctor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
